auth.openVerificationLink: Open the verification link from your email to continue.
auth.enterCode: Enter the 4-digit code from your email.
auth.checkEmailMessage: Please check your email for the verification link, then enter your 4-digit code.
auth.verifyBanner: Please verify your email to secure your account.

game.moveToPosition: Move to Position • Click/Space to Drop

instructions.title: How to Play:
instructions.desktop: Desktop: Move mouse to position fruit, click or press Space to drop
instructions.mobile: Mobile: Touch and drag to position, release to drop
instructions.merge: When 2 identical fruits touch, they instantly merge into the next larger fruit!
instructions.chain: Chain reactions occur when merged fruits touch more identical fruits
instructions.physics: Fruits roll, tip, and stack realistically - use physics to your advantage!
instructions.gameOverRule: Don't let fruits stack above the Game Over line for 2 seconds!
